distance_scale.description: The multiplier applied to horizontal velocity when jumping.

height.description: The force applied vertically when jumping.

jump_delay.description: Amount of ticks between sequential jumps.

description: Defines a dynamic type jump control that will change jump properties based on the speed modifier of the mob.Requires `minecraft:movement.skip` to be used.

fast_skip_data.description: The jump data used for the fast skip.

regular_skip_data.description: The jump data used for the regular skip.

title: minecraft:jump.dynamic
